original_image_tags: Two punch holes at top center. Red stamped number "232" next to typed case number. Stamped "RECORDED - 92" and "EX-43" on left margin. Red "FW" initial at top right corner. Mailed stamp at bottom: "MAILED 15 / JUL 19 1950 / COMM. FBI". Another date stamp partially visible: "JUL 29 1950".

elements.description: Typed memo page containing multiple paragraphs of text, including headers 'SAC, Washington Field', 'Director, FBI', 'FLYING DISCS', 'INTERNAL SECURITY - X', and 'Reurlet 6-29-50.' Date 'July 19, 1950' is in the top right. A list of names (Tolson, Ladd, Clegg, Glavin, Nichols, Rosen, Tracy, Harbo, Mohr, Tele. Room, Nease, Gandy) is in the bottom left. The rest is typed instructional text.

judge.reason: Description A details multiple stamped text elements (e.g., 'RECORDED - 92', 'EX-43', 'MAILED 15 / JUL 19 1950 / COMM. FBI') while Description B reads entirely different text (e.g., 'FLYING DISCS', 'INTERNAL SECURITY - X') and describes a typed memo with a list of names, indicating a major discrepancy in the visual content being described.
